'''Alc''' was a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the third world in the [[Gacerian system/Legends|Gacerian system]]. Alc possessed a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] suitable for colonization, but geological surveys reported that the cost of settling the planet would far outweigh any profit to be made from exploiting the planet's resources. It had a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]'' {{1stm}}
